name: cv2-map
description: Pixel-perfect Castlevania II map extraction tools.

scripts.mesen:smoke: node src/index.js mesen-capture --rom roms/cv2.nes --script tools/mesen/smoke-capture.lua --out out/mesen-smoke --timeout 10
scripts.mesen:memtypes: node src/index.js mesen-capture --rom roms/cv2.nes --script tools/mesen/discover-memtypes.lua --out out/mesen-memtypes --timeout 10
scripts.capture:jova: node src/index.js mesen-capture-screen --rom roms/cv2.nes --name jova-day --location Jova --variant day --access outdoor --out out/captures/jova-day --timeout 60 --start-presses 240:20,2000:20,3500:20 --capture-frame 5000
scripts.capture:jova-right: node src/index.js mesen-capture-screen --rom roms/cv2.nes --name jova-right-day --location "Jova right screen" --variant day --access outdoor --out out/captures/jova-right-day --timeout 60 --inputs start:240:20,start:2000:20,start:3500:20,right:3900:1200 --capture-frame 5200
scripts.capture:jova-woods: node src/index.js mesen-capture-screen --rom roms/cv2.nes --name jova-woods-day --location "Jova Woods" --variant day --access outdoor --out out/captures/jova-woods-day --timeout 30 --state out/states/jova-woods.mss --settle-frames 30
scripts.capture:dora-woods-part-2: node src/index.js mesen-capture-screen --rom roms/cv2.nes --name dora-woods-part-2-day --location "Dora Woods - Part 2" --variant day --access outdoor --out out/captures/dora-woods-part-2-day --timeout 30 --state out/states/dora-woods-part-2.mss --settle-frames 30
scripts.capture:dabis-path: node src/index.js mesen-capture-screen --rom roms/cv2.nes --name dabis-path-day --location "Dabi's Path" --variant day --access outdoor --out out/captures/dabis-path-day --timeout 30 --state out/states/dabis-path.mss --settle-frames 30
scripts.audit:render-recipes: node src/index.js audit-render-recipes --rom roms/cv2.nes --fixtures data/render-recipe-fixtures.json --out out/render-recipe-audit
scripts.render:recipe-atlas: node src/index.js render-recipe-atlas --rom roms/cv2.nes --audit out/render-recipe-audit/audit.json --out out/render-recipe-atlas
scripts.decode:title-transfer: node src/index.js decode-transfer --rom roms/cv2.nes --bank 4 --address 0x8000 --mirroring vertical --out out/decoder/title-transfer.bin
scripts.render:jova-native: node src/index.js render-background-native --rom roms/cv2.nes --descriptor jova-day --compare out/captures/jova-day/ppu-2000-2fff-nametables.bin --visible-page 0 --out out/decoder/jova-native-nametables.bin
scripts.render:jova-native-png: node src/index.js render-background-native-png --rom roms/cv2.nes --descriptor jova-day --state out/captures/jova-day/state.json --compare-png out/captures/jova-day/background.png --out out/decoder/jova-native-background.png
scripts.render:jova-right-native-png: node src/index.js render-background-native-png --rom roms/cv2.nes --descriptor jova-day --state out/captures/jova-right-day/state.json --visible-page 1 --compare-png out/captures/jova-right-day/background.png --out out/decoder/jova-right-native-background.png
scripts.render:jova-woods-native-png: node src/index.js render-background-native-png --rom roms/cv2.nes --descriptor jova-woods-day --state out/captures/jova-woods-day/state.json --compare-png out/captures/jova-woods-day/background.png --out out/decoder/jova-woods-native-background.png
scripts.render:region:jova-to-veros: node src/index.js render-region-png --rom roms/cv2.nes --region jova-to-veros-day --out out/regions/jova-to-veros-day.png --metadata-out out/regions/jova-to-veros-day.json
scripts.render:segment:jova-woods: node src/index.js render-layout-segment-png --rom roms/cv2.nes --segment jova-woods-day --out out/layout-segments/jova-woods-day.png --metadata-out out/layout-segments/jova-woods-day.json
scripts.render:composition:exterior: node src/index.js render-exterior-composition --rom roms/cv2.nes --topology out/exterior-topology/topology.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out out/exterior-composition
scripts.render:world:exterior: node src/index.js render-exterior-world-composition --rom roms/cv2.nes --topology out/exterior-topology/topology.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --transition-rules out/transition-routine/decoder.json --out out/exterior-world-composition
scripts.guide:web:dev: npm run guide:wasm:build && npm --prefix web/guide-map run dev
scripts.guide:web:build: npm run guide:wasm:build && npm --prefix web/guide-map run build
scripts.probe:transitions: node src/index.js run-transition-probes --rom roms/cv2.nes --fixtures data/transition-probes.json --topology out/exterior-topology/topology.json --out out/transition-probes
scripts.decode:transition-routine: node src/index.js decode-transition-routine --rom roms/cv2.nes --probes out/transition-probes/analysis.json --topology out/exterior-topology/topology.json --out out/transition-routine
